nasb.text: ‘Now if a person sins after he hears a public adjuration to testify when he is a witness, whether he has seen or otherwise known, if he does not tell it, then he will bear his guilt.

esv.text: “If anyone sins in that he hears a public adjuration to testify, and though he is a witness, whether he has seen or come to know the matter, yet does not speak, he shall bear his iniquity;

cnv.text: “如果有人犯罪：他聽見發誓的聲音；他本是證人，卻不肯把看見或知道的說出來，他就要擔當自己的罪責。

ccb.text: “如果有人当庭作证，却不肯把自己所知所见的说出来，就是犯罪，要担负罪责。
